exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
print(len(cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left")))

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"]})
print(bool(cli["cliente_id"].is_unique))

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"] * 3, "monto": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0]})
print(len(cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="inner")))

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002", "C003"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left", indicator=True)
print(m.loc[m["_merge"] == "left_only", "cliente_id"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"], "monto": [1.0, 2.0]})
try:
    cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", validate="one_to_one")
except Exception:
    print("fail")
exercises.justification_from_packet: validate one_to_one fails on right dups.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002", "C003"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left", indicator=True)
print(len(m.loc[m["_merge"] == "left_only", "cliente_id"].unique()))

import pandas as pd
wide = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "b"], "a": [1, 2], "b": [3, 4]})
print(len(wide.melt(id_vars="id", value_vars=["a", "b"])))

import pandas as pd
long = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "a", "b", "b"], "k": ["m1", "m2", "m1", "m2"], "v": [1, 2, 3, 4]})
w = long.pivot_table(index="id", columns="k", values="v", aggfunc="sum").reset_index()
print(w.columns.tolist())

import pandas as pd
print(len(pd.concat([pd.DataFrame({"x": [1, 2]}), pd.DataFrame({"x": [3, 4]})], ignore_index=True)))

import pandas as pd
long = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "a"], "periodo": ["m1", "m2"], "monto": [1, 2]})
w = long.pivot_table(index="id", columns="periodo", values="monto", aggfunc="sum")
w.columns = [str(c) for c in w.columns]
print(list(w.columns))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Flatten pivoted column names to str.

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": [1], "monto": [2.0]})
print(set(df.columns) == {"cliente_id", "monto"})

import pandas as pd
print(pd.DataFrame({"a": [1], "b": [2]}).rename(columns={"a": "monto"}).columns.tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [10.0, 5.0, 3.0]})
print(df.groupby("region")["monto"].sum().to_dict())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [10.0, 5.0, 3.0]})
print(df.groupby("region")["monto"].transform("mean").tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: transform mean reinjects to original shape.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [10.0, 5.0, 3.0]})
out = df.groupby("region", as_index=False).agg(total=("monto", "sum"), n=("monto", "count"))
print(out.columns.tolist())

import pandas as pd
import math
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, 3.0]).rolling(2).mean()
print([None if (isinstance(v, float) and math.isnan(v)) else float(v) for v in s.tolist()])
exercises.justification_from_packet: rolling mean; first nan as None.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C002"], "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-15", "2024-03-01", "2024-02-01"])})
df["cohort"] = df.groupby("cliente_id")["fecha"].transform("min").dt.to_period("M").astype(str)
print(df.drop_duplicates("cliente_id").set_index("cliente_id")["cohort"].to_dict())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 3.0, 5.0], index=pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-01", "2024-01-02", "2024-01-03"])).sort_index()
print(float(s.rolling(2).mean().iloc[-1]))

parts = [10.0, 20.0, 70.0]
total = 100.0
print(abs(sum(parts) - total) < 1e-9)
exercises.justification_from_packet: parts sum equals total within eps.

exercises.code: print(10 / 40)

import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({"fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01"]), "monto": [10.0, 999.0]})
print(tx.loc[tx["fecha"] <= pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31"), "monto"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({"fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01"]), "monto": [10.0, 999.0]})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
print(float(tx["monto"].sum()) - float(tx.loc[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff, "monto"].sum()))

import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"], "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01"]), "monto": [10.0, 999.0]})
print(tx[tx["fecha"] <= pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")].groupby("cliente_id")["monto"].max().to_dict())
